page_content:
Program Educational Objectives Broadly stated, the Program Educational Objectives (PEOs) for the undergraduate major in computer engineering pertain to the accomplishments and performance of our students within a few years from graduation. These objectives are determined in consultation with the various constituencies of the computer engineering program and agreed upon and approved by a consensus of the faculty.

Within a few years from graduation, a graduate of computer engineering will have engaged in professional development, and will have attained any of the following program educational objectives:

1. Achieve advanced technical expertise and/or advance to a leadership
